description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a reinforced front bumper and a prominent grille, designed for durability and off-road performance. The exterior is finished in a sleek combination of gray and black with dynamic, racing-inspired graphics along the sides. Large, knobby tires with deep treads provide excellent traction on rough surfaces, while the exposed suspension components suggest advanced shock absorption for rugged terrain. The vehicle is equipped with a rear spoiler, roof-mounted auxiliary lights, and visible air intakes, enhancing both its aggressive appearance and functionality. The cockpit is enclosed with tinted windows, and the doors are contoured for aerodynamic efficiency. The overall design emphasizes speed, stability, and occupant safety, making it suitable for urban and off-road environments.
description: A rugged, gray-and-black all-terrain vehicle with large knobby tires, exposed suspension, and racing graphics, built for high performance and durability. Features include a rear spoiler, roof lights, and a reinforced front bumper.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, grille, roof-mounted lights, and the wide stance of the tires.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dynamic graphics, large tires, contoured doors, and visible suspension components.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rear spoiler, taillights, and the robust back bumper, with the exhaust pipe visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same aggressive tire profile, graphics, and aerodynamic features.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose and uneven terrain, making them ideal for off-road and all-terrain use.
